name: Rust env_logger
sampleLines: [2024-04-28T04:02:04.123456Z WARN  reqwest::connect] connection reset by peer
[2024-04-28T04:02:05+02:00 ERROR myapp] failed to load configuration: Permission denied
description: Adapted from lnav src/formats/env_logger_log.json (BSD-2-Clause). Matches rust-cli/env_logger's default `default_format`: '[timestamp LEVEL module_path] message' (see env_logger crate docs, fmt::Formatter::default_format).
